summary: Prepared clean local TestFlight build readiness evidence without claiming TestFlight proof. The proof artifact records current version/build/commit provenance, the release gate commands that passed, and the exact Build Info gate required before TestFlight proof retry can become executable.

contract_status_changes.before: TestFlight proof retry was blocked behind a fresh clean TestFlight build, but there was no slice-local proof artifact recording the current clean release-prep gate and the exact archive/upload expectations.
contract_status_changes.after: The repo now has `automation/proofs/owlory-release-clean-testflight-build-prep/` with local provenance, passed release gates, archive checklist, and Build Info gate expectations.

contract_status_changes.before: `owlory-release-clean-testflight-build-prep` was queued as the safe unblocker for TestFlight proof readiness.
contract_status_changes.after: `owlory-release-clean-testflight-build-prep` is done, while TestFlight proof retry and capture remain blocked until a fresh installed TestFlight build exists and Build Info provenance passes.

residual_risks: No Xcode archive was created in this slice.
No App Store Connect upload or TestFlight install was performed.
No TestFlight Build Info screenshot or Continue flow artifact was captured.
The next proof retry still depends on an external fresh TestFlight build from clean committed source.
recommended_next_reason: No repo-executable TestFlight proof slice is eligible until a fresh installed TestFlight build exists and passes the Build Info provenance gate.
